title: Gain 5 Points
description: You feel great about yourself. Gain 5 points immediately.

title: Lose 3 Points
description: Oops. Lose 3 points. It happens to the best of us.

title: Give 5 Points to Any Player
description: Pick another player. They gain 5 points. Bask in their gratitude.

title: Steal 3 Points
description: Take 3 points from any player of your choice. They had too many anyway.

title: Skip Your Turn
description: You are overcome with indecision. Skip your next turn.

title: Skip the Next Player's Turn
description: The player to your left is suddenly very busy. They skip their next turn.

title: Reverse Turn Order
description: Everything is backwards now. Reverse the direction of play.

title: Draw 3 Cards
description: More cards! You draw 3 cards from the draw pile.

title: Everyone Draws 2
description: The generosity! All players (including you) draw 2 cards.

title: Discard Your Hand
description: Start fresh. Discard your entire hand, then draw 5 new cards.

title: Win the Game
description: Congratulations! You win immediately. The game is over. Really.

title: Person with Fewest Points Wins
description: New game rule: the player with the FEWEST points at game end wins instead.

title: Double Points on Next Play
description: Stay in play. The next card you play scores double points.

canonical.snippet: The next card the actor plays scores double points. No runtime point-multiplier op exists yet; a later rules-as-data bead should add one.

title: Negate the Previous Card
description: That didn't count. Negate the effect of the last card played.

canonical.snippet: Undo the effect of the last card played. No runtime history/negation op exists yet; a later rules-as-data bead should add one.

title: Trade Hands with Any Player
description: Pick another player. Swap your entire hand of cards with theirs.

canonical.snippet: The actor picks another player and swaps their entire hand with that player's hand. No runtime hand-swap op exists yet; a later rules-as-data bead should add one.

title: Uno
description: Announce 'Uno!' if you have exactly one card left, or play this card to make someone else who has one card draw two.

canonical.snippet: If target player has exactly 1 card in hand, they draw 2. If you have 1 card and announce Uno before this is played against you, effect is negated.

title: The Floor Is Lava
description: Stay in play. Any player who stands up during the game loses 5 points.

canonical.snippet: If any player stands from their seat while this card is in play, they lose 5 points. Honor system applies.

title: This Card is Worth 10 Points If You Keep It
description: Hold onto this card. At game end, it's worth 10 points — but only if you still have it.

title: Nothing Happens (Officially)
description: Play this card. Read it aloud. Nothing happens. Thank you for your participation.

args.note: Nothing happens. Thank you for your participation.

title: Create a New Rule
description: Invent a new rule. Write it on a blank card right now and shuffle it into the deck. The rule is now in effect.

canonical.snippet: The active player invents a rule, writes it on a blank card, shuffles it into the draw pile, and announces it. The rule takes effect immediately.
